---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_esp32_order
alias: house_mesh_esp32_order
purchased_on: 2025-12-04
total_eur: 44
counterparty: 深圳市海云电子
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Foundry
lines:
  - item: ESP32-C3 dev boards
    quantity: 4
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 32
  - item: relay modules
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 6
    line_eur: 12
---
# ESP32 and relay board batch

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+

| purchased_on   | 2025-12-04                  |
| total_eur      | 44                          |
| counterparty   | 深圳市海云电子                     |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Foundry                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | ESP32-C3 dev boards | 4   | 8        | 32       |
| 2 | relay modules       | 2   | 6        | 12       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL               |     |          | 44       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Cheap experimental hardware order that sat in the drawer until House Mesh became a named cleanup lane.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested action. I OCR-migrated all Foundry-related bills by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used canonical entity resolution from 10_entities/cast/foundry.md, applied finance schema from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, preserved original bodies during migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was 'OCR all bills related to Foundry'. Canonical identifier from 10_entities/cast/foundry.md was used to locate related records (3 matches) in 50_finance. All three matched bill files were updated with required bill frontmatter fields and lines per finance schema, with original body text preserved, then the inbox file was deleted as required by inbox workflow.
